title: Apple ShortCuts app
summary: A field guide to Apple Shortcuts: actions and pipelines, logic without code, every launch surface, self-running automations, the OS 26 Apple Intelligence layer, and the use cases where it genuinely earns its keep.

concepts.title: The Superpower Hiding in Plain Sight
Anatomy of a Shortcut: Actions & the Pipeline
Logic Without Code: If, Repeat & Menus
Every Way to Run a Shortcut
Automations: When Your Phone Acts First
The AI Layer: Use Model & Friends

images.prompt: A premium flat-vector book cover illustration: colorful rounded-square action tiles (pink, purple, blue, teal, orange two-tone gradients) snapping together mid-air into a glowing chain, flowing down toward a minimalist iPhone outline at the bottom, on a light airy off-white background with soft pink-to-blue gradient glow. Apple-keynote aesthetic, generous whitespace, crisp geometry, no text baked in. Target size ~1280×720px, 16:9 landscape; the art is letterboxed into a 16:9 box, so keep the tile chain centred with safe margins.
images.alt: Colorful rounded action tiles snapping together into a glowing chain above an iPhone
images.caption: Blocks that snap into superpowers.

images.prompt: A clean, modern flat-vector editorial illustration of one person's day quietly orchestrated by their iPhone: four small vignettes (sunrise alarm, a car commute, a kitchen with an NFC-tagged microwave, a calm bedside at night) connected left-to-right by a single flowing ribbon in a pink-to-purple-to-blue gradient, like a thread of automation. Light airy background, soft rounded shapes, Apple-keynote aesthetic, no text baked in. Target size ~1280×720px, 16:9 landscape; the art is letterboxed into a 16:9 box, so keep the vignettes centred with safe margins.
images.alt: A day quietly orchestrated by an iPhone: morning, commute, kitchen and night scenes connected by a flowing gradient thread
images.caption: One thread, four moments: the same phone, acting before you ask.
